title: AI Summary of Item and Subitem Updates in a Monday Doc Form
excerpt: As in title, being able to have a summary is great, but having an ability to have it in a document form would be even better. Having an option to both include updates on item and subitem level in a document form. Include…

posts.author: Alenm (Alen)
posts.cookedHtml:
As in title, being able to have a summary is great, but having an ability to have it in a document form would be even better. Having an option to both include updates on item and subitem level in a document form. Included is a screenshot of the idea.

Screenshot 2024-09-17 110520779×408 49.3 KB
